threads: migrating PostgreSQL database to new RDS instance

messages.content: We need to migrate the agents database to a new RDS instance. Current connection: postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary.internal:5432/agents
Got it. I'll plan the RDS migration for postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary.internal:5432/agents. What's the target instance class and are there any pending migrations?
Target is db.r6g.xlarge. We have migration 047 pending: /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql

Plan: 1) Snapshot current db-primary, 2) Apply migration /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql to the new r6g.xlarge instance, 3) Switch connection strings. Should we run the migration before or after cutover?
Run migration before cutover. Snapshot first
Creating RDS snapshot rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000 before touching anything at postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary.internal:5432/agents.
Snapshot created: rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000
Snapshot rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000 confirmed. Safe to proceed. Restoring to new db.r6g.xlarge instance from the snapshot.
New instance is ready at db-primary-new.internal
New db.r6g.xlarge instance is up at db-primary-new.internal. Running migration /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql against it now.
What does migration 047 do?

Reading /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql — it adds an agent_metadata JSONB column to the agents table and creates a GIN index for metadata queries.
Run it
Applying schema-migration-v047 (/home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql) to db-primary-new.internal.
Migration succeeded. 0 errors
schema-migration-v047 applied cleanly. The new r6g.xlarge instance at db-primary-new.internal has the updated schema. Ready to test connectivity.
Test the connection
Testing connection to postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents — connected successfully. agent_metadata column present.
Run the read replica lag check
Checking replication lag on db-primary-new.internal. Lag is 0 seconds — replica is fully caught up.
Switch the connection string
Switching application connection string from postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary.internal:5432/agents to postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents.
Update all config files
Updating all references to the old db-primary.internal connection. The new connection is postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents.
How many config files reference the old connection?
Found 7 config files referencing postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary.internal:5432/agents. Updating all 7 to db-primary-new.internal.
Done. Verify no old references remain
Scanning codebase — 0 remaining references to db-primary.internal. All configs now point to postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents.
Decommission the old instance
Before decommissioning, confirming snapshot rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000 is retained. Old instance db-primary.internal is ready for decommission.
Keep the snapshot for 30 days
Setting snapshot rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000 retention to 30 days. Old db-primary.internal can now be terminated.
What was the migration version?
The migration was schema-migration-v047, file /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql, applied to the new db.r6g.xlarge instance.
Write the migration runbook

Writing RDS migration runbook: snapshot first (rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000), restore to r6g.xlarge, apply schema-migration-v047, test connection to postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents, update 7 config files, decommission old.
Good. What's the new connection string?
New production connection: postgresql://prod:xK9mP2rL@db-primary-new.internal:5432/agents on db.r6g.xlarge with schema-migration-v047 applied.
All done

RDS migration complete. Snapshot rds:db-primary-snap-20260505-120000 retained. Migration /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/repos/molt-infra/db/migrations/047_add_agent_metadata.sql applied. New connection active.
